Name: Average time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants where both activities occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Reviewer Agreed to be performed after First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation in variants leading to acceptance
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average cycle time of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation when followed by SW-Reviewer Agreed within the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time elapsed from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that include SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total resolution time of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation in cases where SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs versus cases where it does not
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs

Name: Average waiting time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to the next reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Initial Reviewer Selection) in variants containing SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-EIC Accept in variants that pass through SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Minimum time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation in revision loops initiated after SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Total time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to Manuscript Export Succeeded in terminal variants that include SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'
